KPR Charities established the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology in the year 2009 as a new generation Engineering college in Coimbatore. The institute is affiliated with Anna University with the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) approval, and it is committed to an incomparable learning experience. The institute is committed to being a universally recognized institute in Engineering and Technology by the year 2020. The institute is located in the beautiful City Coimbatore on a rambling campus of 150 Acres of Land.

* The institute’s vision is to develop into a leading institute of academic brilliance by conveying technological, rational, and specialized skills to the learners for meeting the assorted essentials of the society, nation, industry, and the domain at large.

* The institute is dedicated to delivering significantly based education and improving practical abilities and nonstop valuation of learning and teaching procedure over scholarly activities.

* It improves exploration and pioneering activities in cooperation with the institute and industry of repute and guarantees academic progression to sustain ethics, culture, and communal responsibility.

The institutes take great pride in the main feature such as top-class infrastructure, top-flight faculty, high pass percentage, unique students’ project, well-stacked library, and excellent placement record, etc. Its quality policy is to convey education to fetch academic superiority, make sure students maintain ethical and moral standards, provide the mandate-driven essentials of numerous stakeholders, encourage research, and assist technology transmission of societal consequences.

**KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology** is an autonomous engineering college established in the year 2009 , Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. KPRIET is approved by AICTE, New Delhi and affiliated to Anna University, Chennai. Institution is accredited by NAAC with "A" grade and courses are approved by National Board of Accreditation (NBA). Courses were offered under Bachelor's & Master's Degree as well.

# KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology
## About KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology
Basic information and contact details for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology

*[Image: institution]*

KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology was established in 2009 by KPR Group. KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology was founded in 1984 and is committed to changing the lives of people through manufacturing, engineering, education and charities.

The institute is located in Coimbatore, a city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

There are eight undergraduate courses available at the institute: artificial intelligence and data science, civil engineering, electronics and communication engineering, biomedical engineering, computer science and engineering, mechanical engineering, chemical engineering, and electrical and electronics engineering. There are also a number of postgraduate and PhD programmes on offer.

There is also the sciences and humanities department, which was established in 2009. It is divided into five areas of study: physics, English, mathematics, chemistry and physical education.

Outside of the classroom there are over 100 clubs and societies that students can join. These include the art and craft club, drama club, photography club, business club and software development club.

The Centre for Research and Development is a state-of-the-art research centre that is equipped with cutting edge technologies. The centre carries out research across the fields of physics, chemistry, civil engineering, computer science, electronics and communication engineering, and mechanical engineering.
